entries.name: Ada
entries.description: Astrophysicist protagonist whose anomaly encounter triggers the core investigation.

entries.name: Edgar Potter
entries.description: Disgraced theorist in hiding who developed early convergence/consciousness models.

entries.name: Benny
entries.description: Diner ally grounding Ada while acting as social and practical support.

entries.name: Julian Rubies Shore
entries.description: OPI operator whose loyalty fractures as the truth conflict sharpens.

entries.name: Director Langley
entries.description: OPI leader committed to information containment under stability doctrine.
